data.title: Ecommerce Trends: AI's key conversion metric is improving
data.description: As AI referral traffic continues to rise, Adobe sees visits converting better for online retailers.

data.title: Ulta Beauty, Google partner on agentic commerce launch through Gemini
data.description: Google and Ulta have announced two key AI offerings together. The first is agentic commerce in Google's AI Mode, which it has embedded in its search interface and within Gemini. The second is Ulta AI, an artificial intelligence shopping agent, or assistant.

data.title: Dick's Sporting Goods tries out AI-powered coaches from Adobe
data.description: The AI agents will accompany other Adobe offerings that Dick's Sporting Goods will deploy for its operations.

data.title: Aptean to release AI agents on AppCentral platform
data.description: The software developer said it designed its solutions to bring AI to organizations that have not yet migrated to the cloud.

data.title: 3M grows sales in Q1, executives address rising oil costs
data.description: On the company's fiscal Q1 2026 earnings call, executives addressed the impacts of rising oil prices on 3M's business. 3M's CEO also shared how the manufacturer is planning to grow its AI-related capacity.
